recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: The Return of Cooler
recommendations.overview: Cooler has resurrected himself as a robot and is enslaving the people of New Namek. Goku and the gang must help.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Super Android 13!
recommendations.overview: Dr. Gero's Androids #13, #14, and #15 are awakened by the laboratory computers and immediately head to the mall where Goku is shopping. After Goku, Trunks, and Vegeta defeat #14 and #15, #13 absorbs their inner computers and becomes a super being gre

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: The World's Strongest
recommendations.overview: The evil Dr. Kochin uses the dragon balls to resurrect his mentor, Dr. Wheelo, in an effort to take over the world. Dr. Wheelo, his body having been destroyed by the avalanche that killed him fifty years before, desires the body of the strongest figh

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball: Sleeping Princess in Devil's Castle
recommendations.overview: Goku and Kuririn are given an assignment by Kame-Sen'nin: "Retrieve the sleeping princess from Lucifer and I will take you as my students." But the mission proves to be more perilous than originally thought.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball: Curse of the Blood Rubies
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: The great King Gurumes is searching for the Dragon Balls in order to put a stop to his endless hunger. A young girl named Pansy who lives in the nearby village has had enough of the treachery and decides to seek Muten Rōshi for assistance. Can our he

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: The Tree of Might
recommendations.overview: Goku and friends must stop a band of space pirates from consuming fruit from the Tree of Might before it's destructive powers drain Earth's energy.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball GT: A Hero's Legacy
recommendations.overview: Son Goku Jr. is the great-great-grandson of the legendary martial artist Son Goku. However, unlike his predecessor he's not a brave fighter. He's constantly picked on by school bullies, his grandmother Pan sees this and she's worried, but even though

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Super: Super Hero
recommendations.overview: The Red Ribbon Army, an evil organization that was once destroyed by Goku in the past, has been reformed by a group of people who have created new and mightier Androids, Gamma 1 and Gamma 2, and seek vengeance against Goku and his family.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball Z: Gather Together! Goku's World
recommendations.overview: In this OVA, Goku and his friends pose questions for the viewers about the Dragon Ball series.

recommendations.title: Dragon Ball: The Path to Power
recommendations.overview: A retelling of Dragon Ball's origin with a different take on the meeting of Goku, Bulma, and Kame-Sen'nin. It also retells the Red Ribbon Army story; but this time they find Goku rather than Goku finding them.
